nasb.text: By your great wisdom, by your trade You have increased your riches And your heart is lifted up because of your riches—

esv.text: by your great wisdom in your trade you have increased your wealth, and your heart has become proud in your wealth—

cnv.text: 你靠著自己在貿易上的大智慧， 增添你的財富， 你又因自己的財富心裡高傲。

ccb.text: 你靠高超的经商本领使财富大增， 因而变得心高气傲。
